items.name: Dr Elizabeth Farrant
items.bio: Elizabeth leads New Path Molecular's strategy, business development, and fundraising. She co-founded the company to translate the PS-targeting platform into first-in-class oncology therapeutics.

items.name: Dr Nikzad Nikbin
items.bio: Nikzad leads the scientific and technical development of New Path's synthetic PDC platform, overseeing chemistry, candidate selection, and preclinical programmes.

items.name: Prof Steve Ley
items.bio: Steve is one of the world's leading synthetic chemists and a founding scientific advisor to New Path Molecular, providing foundational expertise in complex molecule synthesis.

items.name: Dr Debra Nevin
items.bio: Debra advises on chemistry, manufacturing, and controls (CMC), supporting the development of robust and scalable manufacturing processes for PDC-1.

items.name: Dr Steve McConchie
items.bio: Steve advises on clinical trial design and regulatory strategy, drawing on extensive experience in oncology drug development and IND/CTA submissions.

items.name: Prof Glen Clack MD
items.bio: Glen provides oncology clinical expertise, advising on indication selection, trial design, and the translation of preclinical findings into clinical development plans.
